title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 474.558 - Need to promote uniformity of law, consideration given to
text:
474.558.  Need to promote uniformity of law, consideration given to. — In applying and construing the provisions of sections 474.540 to 474.564, consideration shall be given to the need to promote uniformity of the law with respect to its subject matter among states that enact similar provisions.
(L. 2025 H.B. 754)
